Current Body: Open the data panel to pick which columns and rows to show, and sort them.
Open the tool panel to inspect, compare, slice, color, and grab the sheet.
Toggle the voice assistant on or off.
Hover a cell to read its value. Pinch and drag to read a sheet.
Pinch to add a cell, or pinch-drag to add a sheet, then compare them.
Cut a sheet into two along a gridline, with a gap between the halves.
Fill a sheet with a flat color of your choice.
Grab and move the sheet freely. Slice it first to move the pieces independently.
Undo this tool's last change to the sheet.
Undo every tool and restore the sheet to its original state.
Read combined stats for a whole column at once.
Read combined stats for a whole row at once.
Collect individual cells to compare. Pinch a cell to add it.
Collect whole sheets to compare. Pinch-drag a sheet to add it.
Cut the sheet along a vertical gridline between columns.
Cut the sheet along a horizontal gridline between rows.
No hint attached
Switch to this dataset's columns and rows.
Switch to the Columns list to toggle which are shown and sort them.
Switch to the Rows list to toggle which are shown and sort them.
Show every {column/row} in the sheet.
Hide every {column/row} in the sheet.
Sort the {columns/rows} by value, lowest to highest.
Sort the {columns/rows} by value, highest to lowest.
Show all columns and rows and clear any sorting.
Show or hide this column in the sheet.
Show or hide this row in the sheet.
